programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Love on the Run
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Power
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prodigal Son
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Alone
programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength: A look at dolphin rescues, death-smelling pets and a skinny teen with unbelievable strength.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception: Check out mind-reading plants, pagan human sacrifice and Californian time travellers.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Rendlesham
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years a fascinating pattern has emerged, linking UFOs with military personnel and installations. One of the most significant of these events took place on British soil in 1980. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Stephenville
programme.desc: In this gripping episode, Craig and Sarah take on the Stephenville UFO case. They scrutinise all available evidence, talk to key eyewitnesses and grill experts before arriving at a final verdict. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On 13 March 1997 in the night sky over Phoenix, Arizona one of the most spectacular mass UFO sighting of all time took place. Thousands witnessed bright orange orbs moving in formation. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Set-Up
programme.desc: Alexis schemes to prevent Dana from legally adopting Adam's surrogate child; Adam anonymously informs the press of drug problems on Steven's football team; Steven discovers a powerful secret in Dana's past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fair
programme.desc: Sean threatens Dana with blackmail unless she helps him gather incriminating information against the Carrington family; Josh Harris is devastated by Sammy Jo's rejection of his wedding proposal; Fallon asks Jeff for a divorce.

programme.title: Dynasty: The New Moguls
programme.desc: After meeting with Cora Van Husen, Krystle obtains a copy of the scandalous video, proving Blake's innocence; Dex discovers Sean is somehow involved with unsavory characters proposing a multi-million dollar oil venture to Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Spoiler
programme.desc: Following Josh Harris' death, Sammy Jo realizes she must let go of Steven; upset by Steven's uncompromising use of power, Fallon drifts further away from her brother; Dana gives the notes of Denver-Carrington's board meeting to Sean.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Interview
programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Mount Hot Rocks (February 19, 1945)
programme.desc: American forces landing on the shores of Iwo Jima encounter Japanese combatants willing to fight to the death.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Remagen
programme.desc: German forces retreat across the Rhine on the Remagen bridge near the close of the war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Okinawa
programme.desc: Kamikaze pilots guard the island of Okinawa from American forces.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: In 1945, Soviet and American troops press Hitler's armies from the west and the east, culminating in the fall of Berlin.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Commerce Raiders
programme.desc: Heavily armed vessels disguised as ordinary cargo ships patrolled allied waters, sinking supply boats and stealing their content.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Germany
programme.desc: The development of the B-17 bomber, which allowed American planes to reach inside Germany and bomb its cities.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: Catfish UK: Rob & Sarah
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Nathan Henry to help Rob track down his soulmate, Sarah. After two and a half years, Sarah has suddenly gone quiet and it's up to Oobah and Nathan to investigate. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Alayah & Tommy
programme.desc: Alayah and Tommy started messaging on a live streaming platform. Alayah thinks he could be the one, but when they try and meet, he keeps cancelling. Nella and Oobah help to track him down. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Taylor & Brad
programme.desc: Taylor is falling in love with Brad despite never having seen his face. Can Oobah and Nella find the man of her dreams, and will Taylor get her happy ever after? (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Luke & Amy
programme.desc: Drummer Luke first started talking to nurse Amy when she came to one of his gigs 6 months ago. They had an instant spark but unfortunately every time they try and meet she cancels. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alante has been planning a life with his online love. She's perfect but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help uncover a truth that affects Alante's entire town. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a life with his online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him meet her, they discover she may have ties to a former Catfish! (S6, ep3)

programme.title: The Hills: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: Lauren heads to Laguna Beach to get advice from her mother over her recent situation. Audrina meets up with her former fling, Justin. Spencer proposes to Heidi. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Hills: Truth And Time Tells All / Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Now she's decided to give Justin a second chance, Audrina wants Lauren to get to know her boy better. She invites Lauren to drinks, and Lauren agrees, despite being apprehensive. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The City: Queen Of Diamonds
programme.desc: Olivia & Erin have different ideas of how to dress Fergie for an ELLE cover shoot, leaving Joe Zee in the middle. A French photographer is interested in Whitney, but she's unsure. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The City: The Belle of Elle
programme.desc: Whitney brings Roxy to a Glamour magazine shoot, despite Kelly's advice, and it almost ends in disaster. Erin & Olivia compete to be featured in New York's biggest gossip column. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The City: Fashion With A Capital F
programme.desc: Olivia refuses to wear a designer's clothes to their own party, which angers some. Whitney shows Joe Zee her line & gets some harsh criticism. Erin eyes a replacement for Olivia. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The City: The British Are Coming
programme.desc: Olivia's flubs during Fashion Week leave an opening that Erin quickly tries to fill with a new fashion reporter. Roxy impresses Kelly by helping to produce a huge fashion show. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The City: Work Horses And Show Ponies
programme.desc: Whitney and Roxy fly to Miami to put on a fashion show for Whitney's clothing line, without Kelly's help! Olivia fights for her job by scoring an interview with Zac Posen. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The City: One Girl's Trash...
programme.desc: After a successful showing of her line, Whitney's first big sale almost ends in disaster. Erin thinks Olivia is taking undue credit for pulling the perfect look for an ELLE shoot. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: The City: Stage Fight
programme.desc: Roxy & Whitney have a falling out when Roxy dresses a new musician in Whitney's clothing. Erin gains a spot on the Martha Stewart Show & needs Olivia's help to make it a success. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Roommate Wanted
programme.desc: Roxy & Whitney continue to fight & Roxy looks for her own place. Olivia reluctantly interviews a celebrity wearing Whitney's line & Erin sees another opportunity to replace her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Speed
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Pendulum
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Western
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Imitation
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Pilot
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Making moves
programme.desc: Jenelle and Barb start fighting again so she decides to move in with her friend Tori. Meanwhile, Jo confronts Kailyn about filing for child support. Corey and Leah get some alarming news.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: The beginning of the end
programme.desc: Jenelle's downward spiral continues as she gets into a fight with Kieffer and her roommate Tori. Adam breaks up with Chelsea and she struggles to deal with it on her first day of work.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Love comes and goes
programme.desc: Kailyn's child support hearing is postponed. Jo finally meets her boyfriend Jordan for the first time. Jenelle has her day in court for the breaking and entering, and possession charges.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As her final step in getting her life together, Chelsea finds a GED class at a local college and takes her first practice test. Jenelle decides that rehab is the only way she'll stay clean.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey arranges visitation with the girls while Leah moves her stuff out of Corey's house. Jenelle finds out she might be bipolar while in rehab and Chelsea decides to take the GED.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Explore how the seeds of Japan's defeat in 1945 were sown a decade earlier with the occupation of Manchuria in China.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Explore how the Axis Powers' ruthless, brutal occupation and exploitation of other countries contributed to their demise.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Victory in war doesn't just require sound military strategy, vital resources and equipment are also critical. Discover how the Axis powers failed in this regard.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: It took only six weeks for the Nazi Army to conquer France, with an onslaught of tanks, aircraft and German troops. Witness the extraordinary military success of the Blitzkrieg campaign, through rare footage and firsthand accounts.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Germany launched Operation Barbarossa, a savage and merciless attack on the Soviet Union. Now, newly colorised film and amateur home movies provide an unprecedented inside look at this brutal conflict.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Trifecta
programme.desc: It's week 13 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season and, with only three weeks left to fish, and the number one position on the line, every Gloucester captain is desperate to stack the deck with bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Knock Out Punch
programme.desc: It's week 14 of the Bluefin tuna season and with less than two weeks of fishing left, the top four Gloucester crews are locked in a tight race to be New England's best Bluefin boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bait and Switch (Finale Part 1)
programme.desc: It's the final week of the season and Hard Merchandise holds a narrow lead over the fleet

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There are less than five days left before the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts closes and the competition will come downto the very last day of fishing

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Masters of Bluefin (Special)
programme.desc: Take a look back at the best moments from previous seasons as the top fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for supremacy while they pursue the elusive Atlantic Bluefin Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Something to Prove
programme.desc: The best fishermen from Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out on the first day of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 1
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 2
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: Illegal Blinds
programme.desc: Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens: Bears in the U.P.
programme.desc: It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Pure Michigan
programme.desc: The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Detroit River Walleye
programme.desc: Conservation Officers patrol fishermen and women on the Detroit River, on the border between Michigan and Canada during the spring spawning run for walleye.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn East to West
programme.desc: An officer on Michigan's east side meets a driver on the road without a license and an officer on the state's west side patrols during a waterfowl hunt on a state game area.

programme.title: Wardens: Man-Made Fires
programme.desc: Conservation Officers on patrols during fall fishing season as well as spring turkey season encounter suspects that have set fires in conditions where they shouldn't have.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitetail Patrol Tactics
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers employ numerous tactics to enforce the state laws. Some of them include using aerial patrols to look out for illegal activitity as well as keeping an eye out for blinds on state land that have been in place too long.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish Rodeo Part 1
programme.desc: Conservation Officers fish in plain clothes to see if anglers are snagging fish.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: 30 Insane UFO Encounters
programme.desc: A review of the 30 most insane UFO encounters for your eyes delight and its up to you to make your own mind up, if these amazing encounters could be the real deal or one big elaborate hoax

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Island of the Devil
programme.desc: Just 460,000 people live in Tasmania, an island off the southeast coast of mainland Australia. While its human population is small, the majestic state is rich in natural wonders and is known for its large tracts of pristine wilderness.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Arctic Ocean: The Frozen Sea

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real
programme.desc: When Francine has a big paper over Thanksgiving, she copies from a website. There's nothing wrong with that, is there? Everyone loves the new Top Supermarket reality series on TV, except Arthur. Will it end his friendship with Buster?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch
programme.desc: At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.

programme.title: Arthur: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse
programme.desc: Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur: Molina's Mulligan/Buster Bombs
programme.desc: Alberto discovers he has a natural talent for golf and begins to compete, but will his dad's embarrassing cheers make him give it up? Buster has lost his flair for funny, and the harder he tries to make people laugh, the worse it gets.

programme.title: Arthur: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky
programme.desc: Cheating comes in to play when Francine and Brain are locked in a stiff competition to win student of the month. Babysitter Binky introduces his charge to the world of pro-wrestling, but is he being a good role model?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Trouble With Fixit
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Lock Out
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Similarly Different
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Buzz on Windblade
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza, a mind-controlling queen-bee-'Con who has taken control of a small airport.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Ghosts and Imposters
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo in a western ghost town.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 1
programme.desc: As Optimus prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee, the Bee Team tries to prevent Steeljaw's Pack from teleporting that very threat, the First Decepticon, Megatronus, back into Earth's dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 2
programme.desc: Reunited with Optimus Prime, Bee, and his team must use everything they’ve learned together to stop Megatronus from annihilating Earth and Cybertron in one fell swoop.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have their favourite things, but where's Po's scooter? The Teletubbies and a group of children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty buzzy bee.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening. A magic cloud with magic powers rains special magic flowers all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a group of children play hide and seek. The Teletubbies play their own hiding game. Tinky Winky can’t see Dipsy when he hides, and Laa-Laa can’t see Tinky Winky and Dipsy when they hide.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls climb a hill and look at the view. In Teletubbyland, Po looks for Tinky Winky. Over the hills, between the trees and along the path, but she couldn’t see him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Noo-noo wakes up the Teletubbies to watch some children paint a huge mural using spray paints. Laa-Laa is making Tubby Custard, but the Tubby Custard machine makes a big Tubby Custard squirt on Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Po and Laa-Laa.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children build towers of different shapes and sizes. Laa-Laa and Dipsy play an up and down game. They take turns to sit down and stand up, then they go up and down the slide.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children visit a Sealife centre to look at seahorses. The Teletubbies go looking for interesting things. Tinky Winky sees his reflection in a puddle. Dipsy sees different clouds.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a girl a called Rebecca, who shows us her dogs doing some tricks. A swing appears in Teletubbyland, and Laa-Laa plays on the swing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children go to the woods to see some bluebells. Po is walking in Teletubbyland when a bluebell appears. Po shows Laa-Laa the bluebell and then one by one more and more bluebells appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy talk about his cat. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa‑Laa say "Eh-oh" to Po through the window.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles’ sheep, which has to be ready for the lambing season. Farmer Pickles brings the sheep down from the hills and puts them in a pen until the barn is finished.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new exercise park which Mr Dixon’s brother David, a famous goalkeeper, is going to open. Dizzy tries to cajole Spud into joining in a game of soccer, but uncharacteristically the scarecrow doesn’t want to play.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Trix is looking for something to do so JJ sends her to deliver a bag of wood chippings to Bob who is building a Jungle Jim climbing frame in the school playground. Trix likes being busy and starts offering to fetch and carry everything for everyone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day, as the team are building Bob’s new workshop at his new yard. Scoop is desperate to get stuck in and beavers about doing everything he can to help. Bob needs some old floorboards collecting from Bobsville, and sends Scoop to pick them up.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are drilling a special well at their homestead. The well has its own water tank, which needs to be raised from the ground on rocks. Wendy and Scrambler arrive for the first ever time in Sunflower Valley..

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a blistering hot day on Sunflower Valley. Bob and Wendy have got to finish building their workshop – making the workbenches and installing the power tools – it’s an inside job so the machines all get the day off.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob, Scoop and Skip are helping Mr Beasley to install a new Rockery when Mr Bentley appears to ask for Bob’s help. The Mayor wants to stage an art exhibition, but there are no available venues. Scoop suggests renovating the inside of the Old Mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr. Beasley decides to grow pineapples, and the best way top do this is to build a pineapple pit – a special pit, heated by horse manure! Travis wants to help and decides to fetch some horse manure from Farmer Pickles farm in Bobsville as quick as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. At the farm Travis stays safe and snug in his shed, while Spud takes cover in a large barn. The storm causes a lot of damage and a tree falls on Spud’s barn – he’s okay, but his nose is a bit squashed!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have been asked to replace some burst pipes under the main road. Meanwhile Jenny is in town to persuade Wendy to take a much-needed holiday. Unfortunately, there’s lots of work to do and Wendy simply doesn’t have time to go away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Keegan
programme.desc: A story of loyalty, resilience, and the unbreakable bond. When Keegan Bradley was left off the 2023 Ryder Cup team, it was his close-knit circle of friends-who helped him stay grounded. Two years later, Keegan returns as Ryder Cup Captain.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is that you?"
programme.desc: This episode sees the 'Are You Haunted..?' team travel to the East Riding of Yorkshire area, where a venue steeped in history awaits investigation. Will the team encounter any sort of strange activity during their night here?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Can you not?"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil, and the rest of the AYH team head north, to Northumberland. Here they investigate a location that has for many years been the scene of supposed paranormal activity. And one of the team celebrates a landmark birthday. But who?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Paper cut-out man"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to Durham in the northeast of England, to investigate a venue with many reports of strange activity. And for one team member, it will prove to be a night they won't easily forget.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Knights of the Living Dead
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Worcester, Massachusetts to investigate the Higgins Armory, the only armory in the western hemisphere devoted to arms and armor.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt1
programme.desc: The famous Air Museum in Doncaster houses many an artefact of aviation history and many spirit from its past. Karl investigates one of the huts that is said to be full of paranormal happenings, and he isn’t disappointed.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt2
programme.desc: The main hanger of Doncaster Air Museum is a vast building and houses flying aircraft of every kind. Stuart ventures alone and soon realises something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this large manor house that is said to be swarming with paranormal activity of every kind, and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt2
programme.desc: The creaky corridors and old rooms of Nunnington Hall have many stories of ghosts and phantoms, Stuart investigates the middle floors and starts to experience unexplained happenings.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette & Mary enter the vast expanse of the very haunted A-Wing on their own and soon start to regret their decision.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison Pt2
programme.desc: With Yvette and Mary investigating A-Wing, Karl & Stuart take on the formidable C-Wing where the unhappy spirits of past residents are said to roam.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt1
programme.desc: The formidable visage of Guys Cliff House, a once great home, is awe inspiring, as are the stories pf paranormal activity within. Now home to the Masonic fraternity it is home to two temples and many lodges and chapters.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt2
programme.desc: The lower Temple in this once great, but now ruined castle, is steeped in history and tales pf ghostly happenings. Stuart investigates a room that is said to house multiple spirits and feels something is watching him in the dark.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Find, The Golden Cue, The FBI Story, The Gravedigger's Nemesis, Last Rites.

programme.title: Monster High

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Following the teenage children of famous monsters as they discover who they are, embrace their differences and learn to be fierce and fearless at the one place where they all belong.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Clawdeen, Draculaura, Frankie, and the rest of the boo crew must save the Monster Ball and the world.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Draculaura, Frankie, Clawdeen, Cleo and Lagoona travel to a Transylvanian castle to find a lost vampire princess and bring her back to Monster High.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad searches a tropical island for fabled water monster Gil. But before travelling back to Monster High, an island volcano begins to erupt.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to save Gil's island, the ghouls travel to an icy mountain range to find a ghoul with ice powers to stop the imminent volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad discover Gob running wild in a department store for humans. Now the ghouls have to work together to get him back to Monster High before the store reopens.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Toralei complicates the Ghoul Squad's latest mission to find a hidden monster deep inside ancient catacombs when she tries to take an artefact that triggers the ancient cave's traps.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: An FBI agent reprises his disguise as an old lady to become a nanny in a crime suspect's house.

programme.title: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A driven high school senior with political aspirations falls in love with the seemingly perfect girl-next-door, only to discover that she's a porn star.

programme.title: Ping Pong Summer
programme.desc: Summer vacation…Rap music…Parachute pants…Rich bullies…Young love…Eccentric mentors…Put these together and you get the Karate Kid of Ping Pong. Feat: Lea Thompson & Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Freddy Got Fingered
programme.desc: A man is forced to move back in with his parent's and then refuses to leave.

programme.title: The Frog Prince
programme.desc: A young British girl journeys to Paris to go to college, and is determined to find the man of her dreams and fall madly in love. However, things don't work out quite the way she planned.

programme.title: Deadly Blessing
programme.desc: In this terrifying tale from director Wes Craven (Scream, A Nightmare on Elm Street), a farmer in community of religious extremists dies in a mysterious \\"accident\\", his widow is left to face the frightening cult as strange and deadly events happen.

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Diary of a Nudist
programme.desc: A reporter infiltrates a nudist camp for a story but finds herself embracing the lifestyle, challenging her own beliefs and societal expectations.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger investigates a series of unexplained deaths in a town called Helena.

programme.title: A Soldier's Revenge
programme.desc: Frank Connor is a Civil War hero turned bounty hunter. When two children turn up on his doorstep, desperate for his help to find their missing mother, Frank finds he must face up to his past and the notorious Major with whom he has an old score to settle.

programme.title: A River of Skulls
programme.desc: Left to fend for herself after the tragic death of her mother, Eula is forced to take action to survive. In the midst of the 1870s gold rush, there are few she can trust, and she soon finds herself tagging along with an outcast on a mission.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: Escape Plan: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A riveting thriller inspired by the experiences of real-life CIA officer Valerie Plame, whose identity was revealed after her husband questioned the U.S. involvement in Iraq.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Pod
programme.desc: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: The International Space Station is now a prison - the ultimate black site. But when the imprisoned terrorists take over the Station and turn it into a missile aimed at Moscow, only a shuttle pilot and a rookie doctor can stop them.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: The BFG: The Original Movie
programme.desc: A young orphan girl, Sophie, gets taken away to a faraway land populated by Giants and Dreams.

programme.title: The Wind in the Willows - Original Movie
programme.desc: Toad, Rat, Mole and Badger follow animal etiquette in this version of Kenneth Grahame's classic, in stop-motion model animation.

programme.title: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie
programme.desc: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie is ‘Babe’ meets ‘Marley and Me’ - a cheeky and downright hilarious animal adventure for the whole family! Oh and by the way… there are songs too!

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: House of Darkness
programme.desc: Hap (Justin Long) drives Mina (Kate Bosworth) home to her mysterious estate after a night of drinking. Hap gets more than he bargained for when unexpected occurrences offset his attempts at a romantic connection with this mysterious object of his desire.

programme.title: Agnes
programme.desc: Rumors of demonic possession at a religious convent prompts a church investigation into the strange goings-on among its nuns. A disaffected priest and his neophyte are confronted with temptation, bloodshed and a crisis of faith.

programme.title: The Devil Below
programme.desc: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains, which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate when a bakery owner is gunned down on his own premises.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Kill Screen
programme.desc: The CSIs find themselves immersed in the world of competitive video gaming when they discover a murder may be related to a high-stakes tournament.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flash Pop
programme.desc: A lab tech is murdered in a case that has similarities to a 1950’s cold case, the CSIs get a glimpse into what goes on in the shadows of the lab.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sláinte

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on a college campus where Diana's (Tembi Locke) alternate appears, a distressed version of herself; Mallory (Robert Floyd) experiences violent flashbacks from Quinn's life.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a world which looks like Purgatory, the Sliders find a war raging between earthlings and Kromaggs and are recruited against their will to fight.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The weary Sliders are nursed back to health in a monastery run by a group of people who are recording civilization's achievements to help future generations.

programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) is nervous when Holly (Kristen Johnston) starts dating his top client – basketball player Kevin Tyler (Amar'e Stoudemire). Haskell (Wayne Knight) lures Stuart (David Alan Basche) into the world of sports betting.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Epiphany

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dark Horizons
programme.desc: Eight Taelons are killed when protectors' implants are re-calibrated with a new imperative to kill instead of protect Taelons. They fear the Jiridians have found a way to control the CVIs. Meanwhile, their core energy continues to deplete.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When Street solves the 8th dimension of Ma'el's riddle, a beacon leads Liam to a chamber with a healing pool. However, there is only enough in the healing pool to help 6 Taelons. Zo'or will do anything to insure his own life.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Decision

programme.title: The Lost World: A Man of Vision
programme.desc: The five adventurers all experience visions of Summerlee, the companion they had presumed dead after he disappeared into a waterfall. They suffer injury and face danger as they pursue the vision.

programme.title: The Lost World: Into the Fire
programme.desc: The incredible occurs when a Navy airship flies over the plateau. Malone manages to climb aboard, but is ambushed once inside and meets the deceptive Captain Askwith.

programme.title: The Lost World: Out of the Blue

programme.title: The Lost World: The Travelers

programme.title: The Lost World: Eye for an Eye

programme.title: The Lost World: True Spirit

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E9 - Losing Time

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
